---
title: blank-imports
description: "Require blank imports to be justified."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Require blank imports to be justified. Strider default: main and test packages exempt.

## Bad

```go
import _ "example.com/driver"
```

## Good

```go
import _ "example.com/driver" // register the driver
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only blank-imports`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
